_comment: Sponsor inventory. WPR ad ops fills these without code changes — the frontend hides any slot that doesn't have a `name`. Slot keys: 'title' (masthead), 'ticker' (above recent scores), 'standings:<conference>' (per conference, e.g. 'standings:VFA West'), 'school:<school_id>' (per team page, e.g. 'school:wausau-east'). Each slot is { label?: string (default 'Presented by'), name: string, logo_url?: string, link_url?: string }. To enable a slot, set `name`. Leave name empty/null to hide it.
